UW-11  RADIOGRAPHIC EXAMINATION. (a) Full radiography. All Category A and B butt welds in vessels designated for full radiography shall be examined in accordance with UW-51. Spot radiography, when permitted by UW-12, shall meet the acceptance criteria of UW-52. (b) Examination requirements for joint efficiency as defined in UW-12 are governed by this paragraph, except as permitted by UW-11(c). (c) Vessels not requiring full radiography may use spot examination per UW-52. Welders performing examined welds shall be qualified as required by QW-301. For ultrasonic examination as an alternative, refer to UW-51. Examination results shall be documented per UG-93.
